description: On election day, a citizen calls the city's information line to find their assigned polling station.

nodes.task_description: Ask the citizen for their residential address.
Use the address to look up the citizen's assigned polling station in the voter registration database.

expected_outcome.value: The system returns the name and address of the correct polling location.

nodes.task_description: Provide the citizen with the polling station's address and hours of operation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the requested information.
